title: Wen's Create Experience
description: My own modpack focusing on Create and it's addons. With many Perfomance, QoL, Terrain / Structure generation mods
body:
This is my own curated modpack for Minecraft 1.21.1. It primarily revolves around the **Create** mod, the **“Let’s Do”** mod series, and **Farmer’s Delight**, along with a variety of performance, terrain/structure generation, visual and quality-of-life improvements.

_Currently only made for 1.21.1 NeoForge_
